📝 Mayor's Blog Update (Published: June 21, 2026)

On Sunday, June 21 (Reiwa 8), I was invited to and gave remarks at the 2026 Annual General Meeting of NPO Nukumori Welfare Association Tanpopo (特定非営利活動法人ぬくもり福祉会たんぽぽ), held at Marroad Inn Hanno.

Source (Japanese): https://www.city.hanno.lg.jp/shiseijoho/shichoshitsu/shichoblog/shisei2026/shisei202606/13872.html
summary: 📝 Mayor's Blog: NPO Nukumori Welfare Association Tanpopo 2026 Annual General Meeting
